description: Every KDP Niche Finder bucket as a local research database — rank niches across buckets, track whether revenue is rising or fading, and export shortlists, none of which the web tool does.

novel_features.name: Opportunity rank
novel_features.description: Rank niches across all four buckets at once by a composite of estimated revenue, sales, and price.

novel_features.name: Revenue drift
novel_features.description: Show which synced niches are rising or fading in estimated revenue versus an earlier snapshot.

novel_features.name: Cross-bucket dedup
novel_features.description: Find books that appear in more than one niche bucket (same ASIN) and show which buckets.

novel_features.name: Publisher saturation
novel_features.description: Per bucket, show how concentrated estimated revenue is among publishers (whale vs fragmented).

novel_features.name: Competitor inspect
novel_features.description: For a focus book, list same-publisher and same-price-band competitors using the extracted ASIN.

novel_features.name: KDP keyword CSV export
novel_features.description: Export title, ASIN, price, estimated sales, and revenue as CSV for KDP backend keyword and cover work.

novel_features.name: Title keyword frequency
novel_features.description: Tokenize synced book titles and count keyword frequency to surface hot terms for a niche.
